description: Per-Member Stats on Insights Page - avg chores/day with std deviation and chore breakdown per member

userStories.title: Add time period selector to insights page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to choose a time period for the stats so I can look at recent activity or all-time trends.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a period selector component below the existing charts on the /insights page with options: 'Last 30 days', 'Last 3 months', 'Last 6 months', 'All time'
Selector applies only to the new stats sections (existing weekly/monthly charts keep their own toggle)
Selected period persists in URL search params via nuqs (e.g. ?period=30d)
Default period is 'Last 30 days'
Selector uses the same card/section styling as existing insight sections
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Server-side queries for member stats
userStories.description: As a developer, I need database queries to compute per-member daily averages, standard deviations, and chore counts for a given time range.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a query function that for each member returns: total chore logs and daily chore counts in the period, so avg and stddev can be computed in JS
Average is computed as total logs / number of calendar days in the period (zero-chore days count as 0)
Standard deviation is computed from daily counts across all calendar days in the period
Create a query function that for each member returns chore counts grouped by chore, sorted descending
Both queries filter by householdId and the selected time range on choreLogs.loggedAt
Both queries only include members belonging to the current household
Only include chores that currently exist (inner join on chores table) — deleted chores are excluded
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Average chores per day per member bar chart
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a bar chart comparing the average number of chores per day for each member, with standard deviation, so I can see who's contributing and how consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Bar chart using Recharts showing one bar per member with avg chores/day as the value
Standard deviation shown as text label on or next to each bar (e.g. '3.2/day ± 1.5')
Tooltip on hover shows: member name, exact average (1 decimal), std deviation (1 decimal)
Chart uses the existing color palette from insights-charts.tsx
Chart respects the period selector from US-001
Data is fetched in the server component and passed to the client chart component
Empty state message when no data exists for the selected period
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Chore breakdown per member with member selector
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see which chores each member does most, sorted from most to least, so I can understand everyone's contribution patterns.
acceptanceCriteria: Horizontal bar chart showing a selected member's chores sorted by count descending
Each bar shows the chore icon, chore name, and count
Each bar uses the chore's configured iconColor for its fill color
Member selector dropdown to switch between household members
Chart respects the period selector from US-001
Data is fetched in the server component and passed to the client chart component
Empty state message when the selected member has no logs in the period
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
